violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fronts of the doors on the prep cooler in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Containers of spatulas and other utensils in the kitchen are stored with the food contact surface facing up.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Unlabeled chemical bottle by the 3 comp sink.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing meat. Vacuum sealer in the kitchen and vacuum sealed chicken wings and steak. Establishment does not have an approved HACCP plan.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
